codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves all four previously blocking scrutiny findings across models, simulated system initialization, and incident lifecycle synchronization. Prior failures from pydantic-models (b964b5a), simulated-system (42a14c9), and sre-environment (1721e31) are directly addressed with targeted code and regression tests.

issues.description: When rollback clears a bad_config flag in SimulatedSystem, SREEnvironment calls remove_faults_for_service(), which removes all chaos faults for that service (including non-bad_config faults). This over-clears in same-service multi-fault scenarios and may hide still-relevant faults.

sharedStateObservations.observation: env-worker guidance says to use StrictInt for strict integer validation, but the fix correctly used a `field_validator(mode='before')` approach to reject float/bool coercion under the OpenEnv Action model setup. Skill guidance should reflect this workable pattern explicitly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/env-worker/SKILL.md (StrictInt instruction) vs implemented validator in sre_agent_sandbox/models.py:43-51 and handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges in /Users/anant/.factory/missions/5eacc6ac-9024-4b6e-9b1b-e7e89bde694a/handoffs/2026-03-29T11-37-41-720Z__fix-scrutiny-blocking-issues__ae9993c8-eb50-4f8a-a966-0e8fc540e127.json

summary: Re-review PASS: all four prior blocking issues are fixed in commit fceea4e with added targeted tests; one non-blocking edge-case concern remains around broad fault removal semantics for same-service stacked faults.
